title: Farmer's Tea
description: Compatibility between Farmer's Delight and Simply Tea!, allowing its drinks to be made in the cooking pot
body:
# Farmer's Tea!
This datapack bridges [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and [Simply Tea!](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-tea), allowing for its drinks to be made in the cooking pot. All seven drinks are able to be made this way, and have recipe book support.

Both of the above mods are, of course, needed for this pack to do anything.

### Example Recipe:
![Minecraft screenshot showing a Farmer's Delight cooking pot making Chai Tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kN6F943r/images/a64167ddf5dee6bd28c1a5af22b49367854e1201.png)
